requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (IEC 60335-2-24 charge limits via GEOSTM / EU approximation)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值，经GEOSTM／欧盟趋同）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值，經GEOSTM／歐盟趨同）

summary.en: Household refrigerators marketed in Georgia overwhelmingly use R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3), a low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant. The refrigerant safety requirements are addressed through the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions (charge limits as a function of room volume and appliance configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements), with R-600a classified A3 (lower flammability) under ISO 817. Under the EU-Georgia DCFTA approximation, Georgia is aligning toward EU environmental and product rules, and as a party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment Georgia is phasing down HFCs over time. Manufacturers must verify that the R-600a charge complies with the IEC 60335-2-24 maximum-charge limits and that product documentation declares the refrigerant designation and charge quantity in grams. For the small charges typical of domestic appliances, no special technician certification is triggered in routine service.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚市场销售的家用电冰箱绝大多数使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3），一种低GWP碳氢化合物制冷剂。制冷剂安全要求通过采纳的IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂规定处理（充注量为房间容积及器具配置的函数、通风及点火源要求），R-600a按ISO 817归类为A3（较低可燃性）。在欧盟—格鲁吉亚DCFTA趋同下，格鲁吉亚正向欧盟环境及产品规则对齐；作为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，格鲁吉亚正逐步削减HFC。制造商须核实R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24最大充注量限值，且产品文件须声明制冷剂名称及以克计的充注量。对于家用器具典型的小充注量，日常维修不触发特殊技术人员资质要求。
summary.zht: 喬治亞市場銷售的家用電冰箱絕大多數使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3），一種低GWP碳氫化合物製冷劑。製冷劑安全要求通過採納的IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑規定處理（充注量為房間容積及器具配置的函數、通風及點火源要求），R-600a按ISO 817歸類為A3（較低可燃性）。在歐盟—喬治亞DCFTA趨同下，喬治亞正向歐盟環境及產品規則對齊；作為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，喬治亞正逐步削減HFC。製造商須核實R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24最大充注量限值，且產品文件須聲明製冷劑名稱及以克計的充注量。對於家用器具典型的小充注量，日常維修不觸發特殊技術人員資質要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant provisions (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements; adopted via GEOSTM / EU approximation)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — Georgia HFC phase-down obligations as a party
EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA — environmental and product-rule approximation framework

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances primarily through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a charge and flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, and through GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China is also a party to the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021) and runs its HFC phase-down under the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because Chinese appliances widely use R-600a and GB 4706.13 derives its charge limits from the same IEC 60335-2-24 parent text adopted in Georgia, Chinese exporters are generally well-positioned on the refrigerant aspect.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 4706.13-2014处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全，该标准纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a充注量及可燃性规定，并通过GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）补充。中国亦为《基加利修正案》缔约方（2021年6月批准），其HFC削减由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国器具广泛使用R-600a，且GB 4706.13的充注量限值与格鲁吉亚采纳的IEC 60335-2-24母文本同源，中国出口商在制冷剂方面一般具备良好条件。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 4706.13-2014處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全，該標準納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a充注量及可燃性規定，並通過GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）補充。中國亦為《基加利修正案》締約方（2021年6月批准），其HFC削減由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國器具廣泛使用R-600a，且GB 4706.13的充注量限值與喬治亞採納的IEC 60335-2-24母文本同源，中國出口商在製冷劑方面一般具備良好條件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge and safety provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237-2001 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentary and verification-based rather than a fundamental technology gap: (1) Product documentation in line with the Georgian-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and the related flammable-refrigerant safety precautions, in Georgian where required; (2) The R-600a charge must be verified against the IEC 60335-2-24 maximum-charge limits for the room-volume and configuration assumptions used; Chinese CCC test data may have been generated under slightly different configurations and may not explicitly confirm the limits relevant to the Georgian market; (3) For any models still using HFCs (e.g., R-134a), the manufacturer should check Georgia's HFC phase-down measures under the Kigali Amendment and its EU-approximated environmental rules. The exact timelines for any HFC restrictions on household refrigerating appliances in Georgia should be confirmed against current Georgian legislation before shipment.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距属文件与核实层面，而非根本性技术差距：（1）符合格鲁吉亚采纳的IEC 60335-2-24的产品文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a／异丁烷）、以克计的充注量及相关可燃制冷剂安全注意事项，并在需要时使用格鲁吉亚语；（2）R-600a充注量须对照所用房间容积及配置假设下的IEC 60335-2-24最大充注量限值核实；中国CCC检测数据可能在略有不同配置下生成，未必明确确认与格鲁吉亚市场相关的限值；（3）对于仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型号，制造商应核查格鲁吉亚在《基加利修正案》及其欧盟趋同环境规则下的HFC削减措施。格鲁吉亚对家用制冷器具的任何HFC限制的具体时间表，应在发货前对照现行格鲁吉亚立法确认。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距屬文件與核實層面，而非根本性技術差距：（1）符合喬治亞採納的IEC 60335-2-24的產品文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a／異丁烷）、以克計的充注量及相關可燃製冷劑安全注意事項，並在需要時使用喬治亞語；（2）R-600a充注量須對照所用房間容積及配置假設下的IEC 60335-2-24最大充注量限值核實；中國CCC檢測數據可能在略有不同配置下生成，未必明確確認與喬治亞市場相關的限值；（3）對於仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型號，製造商應核查喬治亞在《基加利修正案》及其歐盟趨同環境規則下的HFC削減措施。喬治亞對家用製冷器具的任何HFC限制的具體時間表，應在發貨前對照現行喬治亞立法確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits apply via the adopted IEC 60335-2-24; HFC phase-down obligations apply under Georgia's Montreal Protocol / Kigali commitments; exact HFC restriction timelines should be confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant for Georgia-market household refrigerators and is well-positioned, since the adopted IEC 60335-2-24 charge limits share the same parent text as China's GB 4706.13. The work is documentary: declare refrigerant type and charge in grams, verify the charge against IEC 60335-2-24 limits, and check any HFC models against Georgia's Kigali / EU-approximated HFC phase-down. Confirm exact HFC restriction timelines against current Georgian legislation before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是格鲁吉亚市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，条件良好，因采纳的IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值与中国GB 4706.13同源。工作属文件层面：声明制冷剂类型及以克计的充注量、对照IEC 60335-2-24限值核实充注量，并核查任何HFC型号是否符合格鲁吉亚的基加利／欧盟趋同HFC削减。发货前请对照现行格鲁吉亚立法确认具体HFC限制时间表。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是喬治亞市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，條件良好，因採納的IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值與中國GB 4706.13同源。工作屬文件層面：聲明製冷劑類型及以克計的充注量、對照IEC 60335-2-24限值核實充注量，並核查任何HFC型號是否符合喬治亞的基加利／歐盟趨同HFC削減。發貨前請對照現行喬治亞立法確認具體HFC限制時間表。
